title: Transportation

vocabulary.meaning: the movement of vehicles on roads
something used for carrying people or goods
to travel regularly between home and work or school
easy to use and helpful in daily life
full of many people or vehicles

questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'transportation'?
What's you favourite method of transportation?
What will the transportation of the future be like?
What would life be like if all public transportation in your country stopped?
Are you happy with transportation services in your country?
How many different kinds of transportation have you been on?
Will the quality of transportation in your country get better or worse?
What was transportation like when you were a kid?
If life is a highway, what mode of transportation are you using?
What do you think is the most dangerous form of transportation and why?
If you were a mode of transportation, what would you be?
What form of transport is worst for the environment?
What mode of transportation would you like someone to invent?
How has international transportation changed in the past few decades?
What are the transportation needs of your country?
Do you think we are spoilt for choice these days with all the different transportation options?
What do you think will be the next big breakthrough in transportation?
